name: GT-hyp
source: GIVEN HYPOTHESES and CONSTRUCTIONS of the theorem (the contract's standing assumptions; not a refs quote, not an import). K a finite-dimensional Hilbert space. j:B(H)_sa->B(K)_sa a unital order-isometric Jordan embedding: ||j(x)||=||x||, j(x o y)=j(x) o j(y), j(I)=I, AND j an ORDER embedding (z>=0 iff j(z)>=0). C:B(K)_sa->B(H)_sa unital positive. Phi=Cj. F=jC extends to a UCP map F:B(K)->B(K) with ||F^2-F||_cb<=eta, where eta<=eta_0<1/4. Constructions: P=theta(2Phi-1); A=Im P; a bullet b=P(a o b); Ftilde=theta(2F-1); B=Im Ftilde; X star Y=Ftilde(XY); X osymm Y=(1/2)(X star Y+Y star X). These are the verbatim standing data of thm-dilation-compatible; their derived properties are discharged by the imported validated lemmas.
